experience.title: Final Year Intern
experience.description: Designed and developed an IoT Security Sandbox, a cybersecurity platform for simulating IoT environments, executing attack scenarios, evaluating defense mechanisms, and performing automated security audits.
highlights: Designed and implemented an IoT Security Sandbox supporting virtual device deployment, attack execution, defense evaluation, and security auditing.
Developed a scalable backend using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Celery, and Redis, with Docker and K3s orchestration for isolated IoT environments.
Integrated Suricata IDS, QEMU, Buildroot, Kali Linux containers, and Open vSwitch (OVS) to enable realistic IoT simulation, intrusion detection, and network monitoring.

experience.title: Summer Intern
experience.description: Developed an automated code-verification tool to improve software quality and streamline code review workflows.
highlights: Built RuleGuard, a Python-based tool that verifies C source files against SOFIOS coding guidelines
Designed a user-friendly GUI with real-time analysis, detailed violation tracking, and exportable reports
Reduced manual code review time by 70% through automated detection and fix suggestions

experience.title: Summer Intern
experience.description: Developed an IoT-enabled mobile and backend system for real-time environmental monitoring.
highlights: Built a Flutter mobile app connected to an ESP32 programmed in Embedded C using ESP-IDF
Created a PHP/MySQL backend to store and manage DHT11 sensor data
Implemented real-time synchronization between IoT devices and the mobile interface
